note: v389: Time Clock visual cleanup. The idle Clock-In state no longer sits in a redundant card box — the label field + Clock In button now sit flush on the page; the card frame only appears while the timer is running (with a green '● Clocked in' cue). Reworked the Time Log section: the hourly rate gets its own clean row with a $ prefix, and the From/To date filter moved into the log header where it only appears once entries exist (with a Clear button), so the empty state is uncluttered. Log header now shows entry count and running time/$ totals.
